description: Plugin-distributed hooks for staffing-operations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags common staffing-analysis anti-patterns in scorecards/readouts/analyses (fill rate without time-to-fill, margin/% without bill-pay-burden, an external market number with no source URL, candidate/client PII shapes). Set STAFFING_OPS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
